emails.subject: Re: BK Watch Agreement and Next Steps
emails.snippet: Hi Jessica, Thank you for sending this over. I think the script aligns perfectly with the demos I’ve been building, and I’ll make sure that comes through clearly when I showcase them on Monday. It gives me a strong direction to build around. Thanks again, Justin On Fri, Jul 10, 2026 at 1:14 PM Jessi
